decision.summary: Beecthor now favors correction-and-continuation higher, so the cleanest open slot is the weekly BTC $78k reach market.
decision.rationale: The latest April 16 transcript shifts the short-term thesis away from chasing downside and toward correction followed by continuation to 78k-79k while no clear bearish impulse appears. Recent summaries support that same structure: macro still bearish later, but one more upside leg first. Binance execution reality at 73956.96 supports not forcing fresh downside exposure: spot is only 0.88% above the 24h low, 1.95% below the 24h high, open interest is contracting, and shorts still dominate, which fits a squeeze/rebound setup better than a new breakdown. With no open positions and both slots free, the nearest daily upside strike (76k on April 16) is too discounted and too noisy for a conservative entry this late in the session, so under nearest-strike-first the next cleaner expression is the weekly 78k April 13-19 reach market. It is below the preferred 45%-84% band, but the playbook treats that as a soft filter, and here the thesis is unusually consistent across transcripts while the weekly horizon gives the move time to play out.

validation.message: Nearest-strike-first rule rejected the proposed market

details.rejected: Nearest-strike-first rule rejected the proposed market
